name: NIST CSF 2.0 Assessment
description: Assessment aligned to the NIST Cybersecurity Framework 2.0

questions.text: Has leadership approved cybersecurity objectives tied to business outcomes?

guidance.title: Has leadership approved cybersecurity objectives tied to business outcomes?
guidance.risk: If this is not in place, control reliability and compliance evidence may be weak.
actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.
